name: Tongdak Juk (Roasted Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the chicken for 1 hour.
2. Combine all other ingredients to make basting sauce.
3. Pour some sauce over the chicken.
4. Skewer the chicken and grill over charcoal, turning and basting often, for 1 hour. Alternatively, use a rotisserie or roast on a rack in a preheated slow oven (325 degrees) for 3 1/2 hours, turning and basting frequently.
5. Before serving, brush with sesame seed oil to give the chicken a good color and a special flavor.
